title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: gnome-control-center bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for gnome-control-center is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: For detailed information on changes in this release, see the Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10 Release Notes linked from the References section.
affected_products: Red Hat Enterprise Linux for ARM 64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for Power, little endian
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for IBM z Systems
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 10 x86_64

fixes.description: Please backport Fedora 41 changes in gnome-control-center if needed (2025-04-06)
[RFE] Make special Mutter key for triggering overview configurable
Please backport Fedora 41 changes in gnome-control-center if needed (2025-04-20)
Please backport Fedora 41 changes in gnome-control-center if needed (2025-06-02)

full_text:
An update for gnome-control-center is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

For detailed information on changes in this release, see the Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10 Release Notes linked from the References section.
